semantic.role: Define an automated workflow for ad-hoc research benchmark execution in the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Manual trigger via workflow_dispatch (GitHub UI or API)
Set up Node.js 20 with npm caching
Install project dependencies using npm ci
Run the `npm run test:research` benchmark suite
Maintenance scope: update Node version, benchmark scripts, or dependency versions as needed
outOfScope: Automated or scheduled triggers (pull request, push, schedule)
Cross-platform or multiple Node version matrix testing

English.purpose: This document defines a GitHub Actions workflow for manually triggering research benchmark tests on the ArchSpine project.
English.context_and_audience: It is intended for project maintainers and contributors who need to run performance or correctness benchmarks on the research module of ArchSpine. It provides a standardized, reproducible environment (Node 20, clean install) to ensure consistent results.
key_takeaways: Triggered manually via GitHub UI or API.
Runs on Node 20 with npm cache for faster installs.
Executes npm run test:research after clean dependency installation.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 此文档定义了一个GitHub Actions工作流，用于手动触发ArchSpine项目的研究基准测试。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要运行ArchSpine研究模块性能或正确性基准测试的项目维护者和贡献者。它提供了一个标准化、可复现的环境（Node 20，干净安装），以确保结果的一致性。
key_takeaways: 在Node 20上运行，并使用npm缓存加快安装速度。
安装依赖后执行npm run test:research。
